modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty embedding or linking an Excel workbook in Word

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to figure out how to embed or link an Excel workbook in a Word document. They are unsure of the steps needed to complete this task. This issue is causing some frustration as they need to include the workbook in their document for better presentation.
